report_metadata.step_description: Using all extracted inputs from the Design Brief (Step 4), Site Plan (Steps 5–6), and enriched asset register (Step 9), run a structured four-task Customer Connections Review. Task 1: Consolidate all determination of funding requirements from the Design Brief into a structured funding details section. Task 2: Compare the method of supply requirements from the Design Brief against the Site Plan and list any scope missing from the site plan. Task 3: Compare the funding arrangement outlined in the Design Brief against the Design Drawing and list any scope missing from the drawing. Task 4: Produce a complete asset register listing every asset with its legend information, action status (new/remove/replace/existing), and found-on-diagram status.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'analysis_report' containing four keys: 'funding_details' (object with contestable/non-contestable/ancillary cost arrays), 'method_of_supply_comparison' (object with missing_from_site_plan array), 'funding_arrangement_comparison' (object with missing_from_drawing array), and 'asset_register' (array of asset records each with legend_label, action_status, match_confidence, found_on_diagram). 'consolidated_report_path' (string) must be present linking to the Step 10 completion test report. A partial result with some tasks completed is acceptable — do not fail solely on missing tasks if the analytics agent returned data.

files_read.description: Output file produced by the agent

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator

execution_context.prompt:
## STEP NAME
Customer Connections Review Analysis

## STEP DESCRIPTION
Using all extracted inputs from the Design Brief (Step 4), Site Plan (Steps 5–6), and enriched asset register (Step 9), run a structured four-task Customer Connections Review. Task 1: Consolidate all determination of funding requirements from the Design Brief into a structured funding details section. Task 2: Compare the method of supply requirements from the Design Brief against the Site Plan and list any scope missing from the site plan. Task 3: Compare the funding arrangement outlined in the Design Brief against the Design Drawing and list any scope missing from the drawing. Task 4: Produce a complete asset register listing every asset with its legend information, action status (new/remove/replace/existing), and found-on-diagram status.

## INPUT DATA (metadata/context sent to agent)
{"funding_items": 3, "supply_requirements": 25, "legend_entries": 0, "enriched_assets": 18, "asset_register_source": "python_built_from_enriched_assets_step_9"}

## VALIDATION CRITERIA
Must return a JSON object with 'analysis_report' containing four keys: 'funding_details' (object with contestable/non-contestable/ancillary cost arrays), 'method_of_supply_comparison' (object with missing_from_site_plan array), 'funding_arrangement_comparison' (object with missing_from_drawing array), and 'asset_register' (array of asset records each with legend_label, action_status, match_confidence, found_on_diagram). 'consolidated_report_path' (string) must be present linking to the Step 10 completion test report. A partial result with some tasks completed is acceptable — do not fail solely on missing tasks if the analytics agent returned data.

## YOUR TASK
Generate and execute structured test cases against the agent's output. Use the FULL FILE CONTENTS (when provided) as your primary evidence. Cross-reference every item between input and output files. For each test case, document: the input data examined, the expected output, the actual output found, step-by-step execution notes of how you validated, and your final reasoning. Respond with the JSON test report.
